3121990.name: Never Play Evil
3121990.description:
"Welcome to our 50th grand ball celebration. Today is the crowning of my beloved daughter, the one to carry our legacy and virtues. We promise we are not a cult as many believe, we are far greater than that. Will you drink with us or flee from us?"


Step into the dark and eerie world of "Never Play Evil," an action horror noir game that combines puzzle-solving, exploration, and thrilling combat. You are an invitee to the party as a musician in a mansion full of hidden mysteries. Navigate its corridors and confront the forces lurking within.

Immerse yourself in the richly detailed, noir-inspired mansion. Every room tells a story, and every shadow hides a threat. Explore these crafted environments filled with hidden clues and surprises.



Music is really big in this horror game. Find all of the music notes to play different tunes that unlock new locations and help on your nightmarish quest.

Test your wits and discover different puzzles that guard the mansion's darkest secrets. Every solution brings you closer to a bigger understanding on what the mansion is based on.
3121990.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
